hero.title: Beyond the License.
hero.p1: Autoscuole Kiwi is not just a driving school, it is a center of excellence for road safety in Gallarate.
hero.p2: With the technological support and organization of Javed Group, we have revolutionized the learning of theory and practice, making them dynamic, effective, and oriented towards real road safety.

features.title: Modern Fleet
features.text: We use the latest generation vehicles to ensure comfort and safety during every hour of driving.

features.title: Digital Method
features.text: Interactive lessons and a dedicated app to practice quizzes anywhere and at any time.

features.title: Expert Coaches
features.text: Qualified instructors who follow you with patience, preparing you not only for the exam, but for life on the road.
